---

title: "CH19: App Architecture"
subtitle: "Architecture Decision Records for Applications"
date: 2025-01-09
---

# App Architecture Decision Records

This chapter contains Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) for all applications in the MAMBA ecosystem.

## What is an ADR?

An **Architecture Decision Record (ADR)** documents important architectural decisions made during the development of an application. Each ADR explains:

- **Background**: Why the decision was needed
- **Decision**: What was chosen
- **Options Considered**: Alternatives that were evaluated
- **Consequences**: Impact of the decision

## Directory Structure

```
CH20_app_architecture/
├── index.qmd                       # This file
├── ADR00_architecture_template.qmd # Template for new ADRs
├── sandbox/                        # Sandbox project applications
│   ├── ADR_portal.qmd              # Portal load balancer (Vercel + Supabase)
│   ├── ADR_brandedge.qmd           # BrandEdge app
│   ├── ADR_insightforge.qmd        # InsightForge app
│   ├── ADR_tagpilot.qmd            # TagPilot app
│   └── ADR_vitalsigns.qmd          # VitalSigns app
├── l1_basic/                       # L1 Basic tier applications
├── l2_pro/                         # L2 Pro tier applications
├── l3_premium/                     # L3 Premium tier applications
└── l4_enterprise/                  # L4 Enterprise tier applications
```

## Quick Links

### Sandbox Project

| App | Description | Status |
|-----|-------------|--------|
| [Portal](sandbox/ADR_portal.qmd) | Load balancer with Vercel + Supabase | Accepted |
| BrandEdge | Brand positioning analysis | Planned |
| InsightForge | Market insights | Planned |
| TagPilot | Customer segmentation | Planned |
| VitalSigns | Customer health metrics | Planned |

### Application Tiers

- **L1 Basic**: Single-file apps for small businesses
- **L2 Pro**: Modular apps for medium businesses
- **L3 Premium**: Advanced apps with premium features
- **L4 Enterprise**: Enterprise-grade applications

## Creating a New ADR

1. Copy `ADR00_architecture_template.qmd`
2. Rename to `ADR_[app_name].qmd`
3. Fill in all sections
4. Place in the appropriate tier directory

## Related Principles

- **MP064**: ETL-Derivation Separation
- **SO_P018**: Directory Governance
- **MP122**: Triple-Track Subrepo Architecture
